name: Banana Jumbles
recipeInstructions:
1. Mash the bananas with a fork until you have 1 cup.
2. Beat together brown sugar, peanut butter, and margarine in a bowl.
3. Stir in the egg and mashed bananas; beat to blend thoroughly.
4. In another bowl, combine oats, flour, baking powder, and salt.
5. Stir the dry ingredients into the banana mixture.
6. Add raisins and mix well.
7. Drop heaping tablespoons of dough onto a greased cookie sheet or one coated with vegetable spray.
8. Shape cookies with the back of a spoon.
9. Bake at 375 degrees Fahrenheit for 12 to 14 minutes, until browned.
10. Cool on wire racks.
Makes 18 large cookies.
Preparation time: 15 minutes
Baking time: 12 to 14 minutes
